title: Dylan's Modpack
description: Dylan's Modpack, based off Trifecta ReCreated and Trifecta. This is mostly a Vanilla+ pack, focusing on performance and QoL mods like Create, AE2 and Backpacks.
body:
Hi! This is Dylan's Modpack! Based off the packs Trifecta ReCreated and Trifecta, this is mostly a Vanilla+ pack focused more on performance and the slightly modded side of Vanilla+. We add some QoL mods like Create to do small automation, and AE2 & Backpacks to help with storage early game and end game! Currently this pack is being used for a private friends server but its an amazing pack if you just want a slightly above Vanilla experience!

Some other mods and features included are Complementary Shaders, Better End, Farmer's Delight, Supplementaries & many more QoL mods!
